markers.name: Shahreza FOB
markers.description: Forward Operating Base Shahreza — site of confirmed MC-130J and MH-6M aircraft wreckage; attributed to US AFSOC/160th SOAR strike operations.

markers.name: Strait of Hormuz
markers.description: Strategic maritime chokepoint. Approx. 21% of global oil transit. Elevated IRGCN patrol activity reported following Shahreza strikes. US 5th Fleet assets on heightened readiness.

markers.name: Islamabad
markers.description: Pakistani capital. Inter-Services Intelligence and foreign ministry signaling observed in response to Gulf escalation. GHQ Rawalpindi contingency posture under assessment.

markers.name: Southern Lebanon
markers.description: Ceasefire monitoring zone. UNIFIL and IDF observation posts active. Hezbollah rearmament intelligence reporting circulating. Ceasefire technically holding but fragile.

markers.name: Gaza — Beit Hanoun
markers.description: IDF operations continue in Beit Hanoun corridor. Humanitarian access restricted to Kerem Abu Salem crossing only.

markers.name: Taipei
markers.description: PLA Eastern Theater Command conducted 6 ADIZ incursions in 72h window. Taiwan MOD issued standard intercept notifications.

markers.name: South China Sea — Spratly Chain
markers.description: PLAN CV-17 Shandong carrier group transiting Spratly chain. Philippines Coast Guard tracking.

markers.name: Donetsk Front Line
markers.description: Russian artillery tempo elevated along Donetsk axis. Ukrainian drone strikes on Mariupol logistics hub confirmed by multiple OSINT channels.
